title: BSc 1st Year Mechanics & Wave Motion Physics Notes PDF
description: Complete reference notes for Mechanics, Relativity, and Wave Motion. Ideal for BSc 1st Year Physics students looking for exam preparation guides and derivations.

title: BSc 2nd Year Electromagnetics & Optics Physics Notes PDF
description: Comprehensive notes covering Electrostatics, Magnetostatics, Electromagnetic Induction, Interference, Diffraction, and Polarization for second-year undergraduate physics.
author: Prof. S. K. Verma

title: Calculus and Analytical Geometry Notes Free PDF
description: Exhaustive lecture notes on single-variable and multi-variable Calculus, limits, continuity, differentiability, integration techniques, and analytical geometry concepts.

title: Linear Algebra & Abstract Algebra Lecture Notes PDF
description: Master Vector Spaces, Linear Transformations, Eigenvalues, Groups, Rings, and Fields with these simplified academic notes and solved exercise problems.

title: Data Structures & Algorithms in C++ Notes PDF
description: A comprehensive guide to Data Structures including Arrays, Linked Lists, Stacks, Queues, Trees, Graphs, and algorithmic paradigms like Greedy, Dynamic Programming, and Divide & Conquer.
author: Er. Vikram Sen

title: Introduction to Web Development (HTML, CSS, JS) PDF
description: Step-by-step introduction to Frontend Web Development, covering HTML5 elements, CSS3 styling, responsive layouts, Flexbox/Grid, and JavaScript basics.

title: Organic Chemistry Reaction Mechanisms Notes PDF
description: Detailed notes on nucleophilic substitutions, eliminations, addition reactions, and electrophilic aromatic substitutions with full step-by-step electron pushing mechanisms.

title: Introduction to Thermodynamics & Heat Transfer PDF
